IF PLTF PAYS RENT WHEN DUE, AND VACATES AS ABOVE, PLTF WILL DISMISS THIS ACTION WITH PREJUDICE AND WILL PROVIDE DEFT WITH A POSITIVE CREDIT REFERENCE. IF DEFT DOES NOT COMPLY WITH THESE TERMS, PLTF MAY APPLY EX PARTE FOR EXECUTION OF JUDGMENT ON 48 HOURS NOTICE TO DEFT AND DEFT'S ATTY. EACH PARTY WILL PAY OWN A/F AND COSTS. PLTF'S CSL SHALL PREPARE A JUDGMENT.
